summary: This document defines the scope and governance for the organization's internal audit program within its Quality Management System. It mandates a review cycle of at least once every three years for all QMS sections and references a specific SOP for audit execution. The document contains placeholders for audit results and signatures but currently lacks specific findings or detailed schedules.
